title: CorndumGuardianReborn
description: This mod adds corundum guardian boss from Corundum meadows mod in 1.16.5 to 1.19+ with more improvements.
body:
This mod adds a boss called "corundum guardian", which was included in "corundum meadows" mod in 1.16.5. I liked the design of it so decided to remake it with permission. For now, you can't meet it in survival. So play this mod if you want to meet some challenge or need a good boss for your mod packs.

The boss's properties
- Swing its both arms.
- Leaping toward target after certain amount of time. Can leap in chain after landing by 20%.
- After using leaping, its landing will cause shockwave. Can be avoided by jumping.

Watch this video for better understanding
https://youtu.be/E6ZzfyYt-OE?si=z68fw_a3042R53tO


Available config options
- All of its stats
- Stats of its shockwave
- Melee attack casting speed



Curseforge link
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corundum-guardian-reborn

Original mod link
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corundum-meadows
